description: Age / origin inference. Contains TWO sub-blocks with different validation requirements: GDS sub-block (cheat30, dosage-based, group-independent, validation=NONE) and Fst/dXY sub-block (Engine B between HOM_REF and HOM_INV groups, validation=SUPPORTED). If groups are UNCERTAIN or worse, the Fst sub-block stays empty but the GDS sub-block still runs.
question: Q5
group_validation_required: NONE for GDS sub-block, SUPPORTED for Fst sub-block

gds_sub_block.description: Genotype Dissimilarity Score by genotype class. Works on dosage, no groups needed. GDS gap between HOM_REF and HOM_INV correlates with time since inversion origin.

gds_matrix_path.description: Path to TSV matrix in raw/

gds_percentile_global.description: percentile of this candidate's gds_gap across all candidates — older inversions accumulate more GDS

fst_sub_block.description: Hudson Fst and dXY between HOM_REF and HOM_INV groups inside the inversion. Requires SUPPORTED validation — if groups are not reliable, these numbers will be noise. When validation is UNCERTAIN, fields stay null and validation_skip_reason is populated.

fst_decay_rate.description: exponential decay of Fst moving away from boundary (bp^-1)

validation_skip_reason.description: populated if group_validation was too low to run this sub-block

age_class.description: Derived jointly from GDS + Fst: young = low GDS gap + low Fst; old = high GDS gap + high Fst; ancient_fixed = high GDS + Fst approaching theta_pi ratio

keys_extracted_note: The 'from' paths use dot notation for sub-block access. The library's key-extractor must follow dotted paths; this is a small extension over the flat from semantics used by other schemas. Handle by splitting on '.' and walking the data list.
